decisions: Merged TODAY.md 09:44 entry into daily/2026-04-22.md because TODAY.md was dated 2026-04-22 — the entry belonged in that day's log file (daily/2026-04-22.md already had the 00:16 entry)
Retained both daily/2026-04-21.md (2 days old) and daily/2026-04-22.md (1 day old) — neither meets the 7-day deletion threshold, and both are within the recent-retention window
observations: Brain has been running for 3 days (since 2026-04-21) with zero user interactions — all memory tiers (core, semantic, episodic, procedural) remain empty placeholders
Daily log coverage is 100% for days with sessions (2/2), but the brain has only had maintenance-triggered sessions
SUMMARY.md content is unchanged since initial bootstrap — no new information to incorporate
recommendations: Once the first user session occurs, ensure the daily log captures substantive entries (decisions, corrections, preferences) rather than just session metadata
Consider the next reflection (due ~2026-04-24) as an opportunity to assess whether the brain's skill catalog matches any incoming user requests
processImprovements: [self-critique] Three consecutive consolidation runs have produced no tier promotions because the brain has had zero user interactions. The maintenance process is functioning correctly but producing no value yet — it's exercising the mechanism without exercising the purpose.

[proposal] If the brain remains idle after 5+ days, reduce consolidation frequency to avoid empty reports accumulating. Rationale: the 24h guard threshold creates daily maintenance churn with no content to process.
[blocked] Cannot generate meaningful memory content without user interactions — this is expected and not a process defect.
